title: Resolve zeta/kappa condition: ZK1: zeta residual non-metric branch
description: Sector: zeta_residual. Allowed condition: zeta residual is strictly non-metric / diagnostic and has no source, flux, or A-effect. Forbidden condition: zeta residual becomes a metric scalar source or second mass channel. Consequence: safest current zeta residual route; still requires bookkeeping discipline.
